items.subjective_preview: Patient presents for asthma check. Reports using rescue inhaler (albuterol) approximately 1-2 times per month, typically with vigorous exercise. No ni...
items.objective_preview: Vitals: BP 118/74 mmHg, HR 68 bpm, Temp 98.6F, SpO2 99% on RA. Lungs: Clear to auscultation bilaterally, good air movement, no wheezes, rhonchi, or ra...
items.assessment: Mild intermittent asthma - well controlled, step 1 therapy appropriate
items.plan:
1. Continue albuterol HFA 90mcg PRN for rescue
2. Chest X-ray ordered for baseline documentation
3. Continue loratadine PRN for allergic rhinitis
4. Return if symptoms increase to >2 days/week (would indicate step-up needed)
5. Annual flu vaccine recommended
